name: EKS cluster API server endpoint is publicly accessible
description: The EKS cluster Kubernetes API server endpoint is accessible from the public internet. Exposure of the API server increases the risk of brute-force, credential stuffing, or exploitation of API server vulnerabilities.
remediation: Disable public endpoint access and enable private endpoint access. If public access is required, restrict publicAccessCidrs to known corporate IP ranges. Use a VPN or bastion host for cluster management.
